rationale: The citing paper is a methodological contribution on copula-based endogeneity correction (2sCOPE), while the cited paper is an empirical dynamic marketing-mix study that also models endogeneity and price elasticity, so topical overlap is plausible but indirect based on the notes alone. The raw match evidence provides only a DOI match with no in-text citation context or reference text, so there is insufficient evidence to classify this as clearly substantive or clearly incidental.
